message:
feat(test): add proptest_chunk_vector_store with 30 property-based tests

Property-based coverage for generation lifecycle (register, activate, retire),
embedding upsert invariants (insert/update detection, policy validation),
semantic search (limit, ordering, score bounds, profile scoping, uniqueness),
pruning (ordinal cutoff correctness), drift reporting (total chunks, schema
mismatch, L2 normalization), direction/hash/offset round-trips, persistence,
and serde round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
